---
title: "Week 6"
subtitle: "Experiments v Natural Experiments"
editor: visual
---

::: callout-important
PROJECT DUE - Wed, July 29

PRESENTIATION - Thu, July 30
:::

## Prepare

📖 Read *Natural experiments in the social sciences: A design-based approach*. Thad Dunning (2012).

## Participate

🖥️ [Lecture 14 - Experiments](not-avaliable-lec.html)

🖥️ [Lecture 15 - Natural Experiments I](not-avaliable-lec.html)

🖥️ [Lecture 16 -](not-avaliable-lec.html) [Natural Experiments II](not-avaliable-lec.html)

## Practice

No application exercises

## Perform

No lab

# We made it!!

![](/weeks/images/pwhl-montreal-maureen-murphy.gif)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
